steps.title: Trace the passage order
steps.content: The text first identifies community science as a research approach. It then lists benefits, including public awareness, learning experiences, and more data. Finally, it mentions Vargas's butterfly-wing study as an example using that approach.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content: Choice A invents study results. Choice B follows the exact order: approach, benefits, example study. Choice C invents development and future projects. Choice D overstates the text as arguing for a new approach and discussing public opinion. The answer is B.
